author: Engr. Erwin H. Balane (Municipal Engineer, Mercedes)
subject: Respondent's purported reply to the building-records inquiry (ARTA CTN SL-2025-1104-0792)
gap_flag: PHANTOM RESPONSE — the 21 Oct 2025 reply was sent to a non-existent/misspelled address and never delivered; the Complainant only learned of its existence months later. Under R.A. 11032 an undelivered notice is no notice at all, so the 'response' does not satisfy the processing-time duty.

proofs.quote: October 21, 2025 letter as its supposed response
phantom response: Petitioner only learned of its existence months later

author: Jonathan Paul Zschoche
subject: Request to participate in the 6 April 2026 CART proceeding via video conference
gap_flag: LATE RECEIPT — the participation request was only received by the CART Focal Person in the afternoon while the proceedings were already underway, denying meaningful participation.

proofs.quote: only received by the CART Focal Person in the afternoon while the proceedings were already underway
